title: eriogonum thornei
intro: Eriogonum thornei, also known as Thorne's buckwheat or desert buckwheat, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the buckwheat family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Eriogonum thornei can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
